title: Israeli Strike Kills 3 Journalists in Southern Lebanon, Officials Say
summary_full: Israel accused one of the reporters of being a Hezbollah operative. Lebanon’s president said they were journalists and condemned the killings.
summary_public: Israel accused one of the reporters of being a Hezbollah operative. Lebanon’s president said they were journalists and condemned the killings.
